mapper.select: select coalesce(sum(lc.reward_cash), 0) as chapter_reward from user_test_result utr join learning_chapter lc on utr.chapter_id = lc.chapter_id where utr.user_seq = #{user_seq} and utr.is_pass = 'Y'
select coalesce(sum(m.mission_reward), 0) as mission_reward from user_mission um join mission m on um.mission_seq = m.mission_seq where um.user_seq = #{user_seq} and um.is_completed = 'Y'

select (select coalesce(sum(lc.reward_cash), 0) from user_test_result utr join learning_chapter lc on utr.chapter_id = lc.chapter_id where utr.user_seq = #{user_seq} and utr.is_pass = 'Y') + (select coalesce(sum(m.mission_reward), 0) from user_mission um join mission m on um.mission_seq = m.mission_seq where um.user_seq = #{user_seq} and um.is_completed = 'Y') as total_reward

select aa.chapter_reward + coalesce(bb.mission_reward, 0) as total_reward from (select #{user_seq} as user_seq, coalesce(sum(lc.reward_cash), 0) as chapter_reward from user_test_result utr join learning_chapter lc on utr.chapter_id = lc.chapter_id where utr.user_seq = #{user_seq} and utr.is_pass = 'Y') aa left join (select #{user_seq} as user_seq, coalesce(sum(m.mission_reward), 0) as mission_reward from user_mission um join mission m on um.mission_seq = m.mission_seq where um.user_seq = #{user_seq} and um.is_completed = 'Y') bb on aa.user_seq = bb.user_seq;
